narrative:
Wayne (precinct in Noble County) has 375 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
